title: Fix UI state lost on rotation
description: Trace state that disappears on configuration change and relocate it into a ViewModel or saved state.
body: Steps: 1. Reproduce: rotate the device (or change locale/dark mode) and observe which state resets. 2. Find where that state lives — if it's in the Activity/Fragment or a plain composable var, it dies on recreation. 3. Move durable UI state into a ViewModel (survives configuration changes) exposed as StateFlow. 4. For state that must survive process death too, use SavedStateHandle or rememberSaveable. 5. Re-test rotation and a process-death simulation. Rollback point: before moving state ownership (changes lifecycle/scoping). Validation: rotating preserves state with no reload and a simulated process death restores it; state kept in the Activity that resets on rotation is the defect this resolves.
